turns.user: Show me the latest tweets from elonmusk
turns.assistant_text:
Here are the latest tweets from Elon Musk:

- Neuralink is planning its first Blindsight implant later this year, aiming to restore limited vision even for people who have lost it. — [@elonmusk](https://x.com/elonmusk/status/2061705200734543896)
- All accessories to the murder must go to prison for a long time. — [@elonmusk](https://x.com/elonmusk/status/2061704965639618851)
- In his final moments, Henry Nowak told police officers nine times “I can’t breathe” and four times that he had been stabbed... — [@elonmusk](https://x.com/elonmusk/status/2061701267257442740)
- Why hasn’t Vickrum Digwa’s brother (Gurpreet Digwa) been arrested and charged with assisting an offender? — [@elonmusk](https://x.com/elonmusk/status/2061701118925865253)
- I’ve just watched the Henry Nowak body-cam footage. Digwa deserves the death penalty and his family who covered for him... — [@elonmusk](https://x.com/elonmusk/status/2061699685048631582)

turns.assistant_text:
Here are the latest tweets from Sam Altman ([@sama](https://x.com/sama)):

* **OpenAI Foundation's Mission** (June 1, 2026): 
  "The OpenAI Foundation is doing a lot of wonderful things. Helping society become resilient to AI is going to be incredibly important. Much more to come here!" — [@sama](https://x.com/sama/status/2061562575322492937)

* **OpenAI Robotics is Hiring** (May 31, 2026): 
  "OpenAI Robotics is hiring, looking for exceptional full-stack hardware, ops, systems, and ML engineers to help us program and manufacture robots that are useful for society..." — [@sama](https://x.com/sama/status/2061117302528188712)

* **Biodefense Initiative** (May 31, 2026): 
  "We want to help the world get a head start on biodefense: [openai.com/news/biodefense...](https://t.co/gDQfOZrLA4)" — [@sama](https://x.com/sama/status/2061101875303530871)

* **Retweet on User Milestones** (May 31, 2026): 
  "Five million users would agree. Resetting the limits tomorrow morning to celebrate. Time to go /fast" (Retweeted from @thsottiaux) — [@sama](https://x.com/sama/status/2061097558819356732)

* **Commitment to Shared Prosperity** (May 27, 2026): 
  "AI should dramatically increase quality of life and individual freedoms for people around the world. The OpenAI Foundation is making an initial $250M commitment to measurement, transition support, and new approaches to broadly shared prosperity." — [@sama](https://x.com/sama/status/2059677202917331431)

items.title: The OpenAI Foundation is doing a lot of wonderful things.
items.summary:
The OpenAI Foundation is doing a lot of wonderful things.

Helping society become resilient to AI is going to be incredibly important. Much more to come here!

items.title: OpenAI Robotics is hiring, looking for exceptional full-stack hardware, ops, systems, and ML engineers to help us progra
items.summary:
OpenAI Robotics is hiring, looking for exceptional full-stack hardware, ops, systems, and ML engineers to help us program and manufacture robots that are useful for society.

AI should be able to help people in the physical world. In the short term, we are focused on robots to support skilled workers to build our future infrastructure; in the long term, we imagine everyone having a personal robot doing anything they need.

Our world simulation research program, led by Aditya Ramesh (@model_mechanic), has evolved over the past year into OpenAI Robotics. Progress is rapid, and based on a foundation of co-design between robotics hardware and ML research.

If you love working hands-on across the robotics stack and want to build the future, please consider joining us. Send an email with your background and evidence of exceptional accomplishment to: robotics-recruiting@openai.com
